title: Grid Demand Risk Planner
summary: Compare advanced time-series models to forecast demand spikes and recommend procurement or load-balancing actions for grid operators.
knowledge_base: User: utility planners and grid operations analysts.
Primary pain: advanced models are hard to compare in terms of actionable risk and reserve decisions.
Decision output: reserve actions, demand-risk alerts, and load-balancing recommendations.
Business impact: lower imbalance cost and better peak-period resilience.

app_modules.label: Grid 01
app_modules.title: Demand Spike Scenario
app_modules.description: Run a planning scenario for an upcoming load spike and score operational risk.

app_modules.label: Grid 02
app_modules.title: Forecast Variance Review
app_modules.description: Compare the current planning run against the last approved reserve baseline.

app_modules.label: Grid 03
app_modules.title: Reserve Memo
app_modules.description: Draft the operator memo for reserve and balancing actions before peak demand.
